title: Universal Electric Replacement Toothbrush Heads Dental Source Whitening Polishes Teeth Naturally Remove Surface Stains Power Battery Compatible Brush
features: Universal compatibility cup feature gently polishes teeth to naturally remove surface stains
Contains 2 whitening refill replacement brush heads
Universal electric toothbrush heads - Compatible with a variety of electric toothbrushes
Removes up to 90% of plaque in hard-to-reach places
For best results, brush your teeth thoroughly at least twice a day
description: Product Description Universal power whitening 2pk replacement brush heads. Compatible with most oscillating electric toothbrushes, as good as if not better than the largest brands. Compatible with most toothbrush. Universal electric toothbrush heads - Compatible with a variety of electric toothbrushes. Any Queries, Please Contact Us! For any dispute, please contact us before leaving negative feedback. We always sort out disputes with our valuable customers. Directions 1. Attach the head to your compatible electric toothbrush handle by aligning the bristles with the handle and pressing firmly until it clicks into place. 2. Wet your toothbrush and apply toothpaste. 3. Hold the toothbrush at a 45-degree angle to your teeth and gums. 4. Brush gently, moving the toothbrush in circular motions. 5. Brush all surfaces of your teeth, including the outer, inner, and chewing surfaces. 6. Replace the head every 3 months or when the bristles become frayed. 7. Rinse the head after each use and store it in a clean, dry place. Safety Warning Do not use on children or young adults. Keep out of reach of children. This product is intended for adult use only.
